design_system.name: Starfleet LCARS Interface
design_system.layout_philosophy: The LCARS (Library Computer Access and Retrieval System) interface is characterized by a black background, flat colored panels with rounded corners, and a specific 'elbow' connector shape. The layout is modular, with a heavy emphasis on a left-sidebar navigation that curves into a top header. Content is contained within black voids surrounded by these colored bars.

rules: Menu items MUST be uppercase and right-aligned within their pill shapes.
Content text (articles) should be readable standard sentence case.
LCARS numbers (e.g., 402, 12-432) should be scattered decoratively in small font sizes at the edges of panels.

sounds: Standard TNG beep on button press

Button.base: rounded-full uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-2 transition-all duration-200

variants.ghost: bg-transparent text-lcars-orange border border-lcars-orange hover:bg-lcars-orange hover:text-black

Card.base: bg-black border-2 border-lcars-blue rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden
Card.header: text-lcars-orange uppercase tracking-widest text-xl mb-4 border-b border-lcars-blue/30 pb-2

Input.base: bg-black border border-lcars-blue/50 text-white rounded-md focus:border-lcars-orange focus:ring-1 focus:ring-lcars-orange placeholder:text-gray-600

Sidebar.structure: Fixed left width (e.g., 250px). The top of the sidebar curves into the header (the 'Elbow').
Sidebar.items: Right-aligned text inside colored pills. The active item connects to the content area.

layout_patterns.dashboard: Bento grid style but with LCARS dividers. Top section for status, mid for content, bottom for logs.
layout_patterns.knowledge_base: Split view: List on left (inside a panel), Details on right.
layout_patterns.chat: Center-focused terminal window. 'Computer' responses appear typing out.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INITIAL SETUP: Since the frontend folder does not exist, initialize a standard React+Vite+Tailwind project in '/app/frontend'.
2. TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the theme colors with the 'lcars-*' palette defined above. Add 'Antonio' and 'Roboto Condensed' to font families.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Set 'body { @apply bg-black text-white overflow-hidden; }'. LCARS apps typically don't scroll the whole page; they scroll internal panels.
4. COMPONENT LIBRARY: Use Shadcn UI for complex interactions (Dialog, Form, Select) but HEAVILY style them to remove the default border/radius and apply LCARS styles.
5. LAYOUT: Build a 'MainLayout' component that implements the LCARS Sidebar + Header Elbow. This is crucial for the theme.
6. SOUND: Add a simple useSound hook for button clicks (optional but recommended for immersion).
7. CHAT: The AI chat interface should look like a terminal. Use monospace fonts for the 'Computer' responses.
8. ROLE MANAGEMENT: Implement a simple Context for switching between Captain P and Nummer Eins.
9. LANGUAGE: All hardcoded text MUST be in German (e.g., 'ZUGRIFF', 'LOGBUCH', 'EINSTELLUNGEN').
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds; LCARS is flat color.
Ensure high contrast between text (black) and background (orange/blue/purple) on buttons.
Respect the 'elbow' shape: a curved connection between horizontal and vertical bars.
Use uppercase text for all UI controls.
